description: Converse with planetary-agent personas, council feeds & culinary debates from alchm.kitchen
name: io.github.gregcastro23/planetary-agents

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Planetary Agents FastAPI backend that serves persona chat. Defaults to http://localhost:8000 for local dev; set to https://api.agents.alchm.kitchen to use the hosted service.
environmentVariables.name: PLANETARY_AGENTS_BACKEND_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Planetary Agents frontend, used by get_agent_feed_discussion to read council-feed threads. Defaults to http://localhost:3000; set to https://agents.alchm.kitchen for the hosted feed.
environmentVariables.name: PLANETARY_AGENTS_FRONTEND_URL

environmentVariables.description: Default model tier for persona responses: free | cheap_fast | primary | reflective. Defaults to free (the hosted backend reserves paid tiers).
environmentVariables.name: PLANETARY_AGENTS_MCP_MODEL_TIER
